name: Chinese Chicken Stuffed Peppers
recipeIngredient: 1 cup finely chopped chicken (skin removed before cooking)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a 1/2-inch thick slice from the side of each pepper, removing seeds. Reserve slices.
2. Place peppers in boiling water and boil for 5 minutes. Drain and set aside.
3. Coat a large skillet or wok with Pam cooking spray. Add sesame oil and heat over medium until hot.
4. Add garlic and gingerroot; stir fry for 30 seconds.
5. Add carrots and green onions; stir fry for 2 more minutes, then remove from heat.
6. Add chicken and remaining ingredients to the skillet; stir well.
7. Spoon mixture into each reserved pepper slice.
8. Arrange peppers, cut side up, in a 10x6x2-inch baking dish. Cover and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
Recipe details:
- Calories: 231 per serving
- Protein: 16.4 g per serving
- Fat: 6.7 g per serving
- Carbohydrates: 25.7 g per serving
- Cholesterol: 98 mg per serving
- Iron: 3.1 mg per serving
- Sodium: 366 mg per serving
- Calcium: 37 mg per serving
